title: Documentação de Tecnologias — Agente de Diagnóstico CITi
summary: ADR-style technology log: rationale for Gemini, aiohttp, asyncio, rich, python-dotenv, Recall.ai. Includes risks, alerts, and development history.
locked_decisions: No LangChain/LangGraph: 6 concurrent async tasks don't fit LangGraph's sequential/conditional model
aiohttp over FastAPI for v1 webhook server (2 routes, loopback-only)
asyncio.to_thread() for all LLM calls to avoid blocking the event loop
key_risks: google-generativeai SDK deprecated — migrate to google.genai (only impacts llm/gemini_client.py)
Blocking LLM calls must use asyncio.to_thread()
aiohttp queue is unbounded — risk for very long meetings
Recall.ai adapter built for observed payload format; may break if schema changes
CoverageClassifier may hallucinate area IDs not present in schema
